title: Host Styling SVG Postprocessors
problem: Downstream hosts need product-neutral SVG styling extension points such as scoped CSS injection, opt-in CSS override behavior, fallback style propagation, and metadata-aware postprocess context without changing Mermaid-parity SVG defaults.
gates: cargo clippy -p merman-render -p merman --features raster --all-targets -- -D warnings

continue_policy.notes: Host styling SVG postprocessors, metadata context, scoped CSS/override built-ins, fallback style propagation, docs, example, and gates are complete. Split structured XML/CSS parsing or advanced insertion-point support into a new workstream if real downstream evidence requires it.
